---
title: "Carrie Rountrey"
pagetitle: "Carrie Rountrey"
first-name: "Carrie"
last-name: "Rountrey"
credentials: "PhD, CCC-SLP"
position: "Chair"
affiliation: "Xavier University"
pronouns: "she/her"
orcid: "0000-0002-1599-8681"
date-joined: "NA"
order: 8
categories:
  - "Collaborator"
description-research: "Carrie Rountrey, Ph.D., CCC-SLP, is the inaugural chair of the Department of Speech, Language and Communicative Behavior at Xavier University. Her work integrates clinical practice, research, and education to improve real-world communication outcomes across the lifespan.

Dr. Rountrey’s research focuses on speech production, perception, and intelligibility, with particular emphasis on Parkinson’s disease and other motor speech disorders. Her aim is to to better understand and measure communication in naturalistic contexts."
description-os: "She is interested in applying principles of open and collaborative science to accelerate the translation of research into clinical practice. Through growing interdisciplinary partnerships with the new program at Xavier, she aims to position clinicians as implementation scientists and patients as active contributors to the research process."
headshot: "../_headshots/Carrie Rountrey.png"
lightbox: false
draft: false
layout: article
title-block-categories: false
editor: source
---

:::::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![{{< meta title >}}, {{< meta credentials >}}<br>{{< meta position >}}<br>{{< meta affiliation >}}](../_headshots/Carrie Rountrey.png)
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="65%"}
{{< meta description-research >}}

{{< meta description-os >}}

:::
::::::
